content:
✅ Yes. Here Are Three Possible Creative Options:

In addition to a formal research paper, students can optionally add a creative component to enhance their argument.

📌 Creative Add-On Options:
1. Adaptation Analysis – Rewrite a passage from their chosen text in a different genre, form, or modernized context (e.g., turn a scene into a screenplay, graphic novel, or podcast script).
2. Visual Component – Create an illustrated infographic, zine, or conceptual mood board that captures the themes, aesthetics, and symbols of their research.
3. Fictionalized Response – Write a short story, poem, or monologue in response to the original text, engaging with its themes from a different perspective.

📌 Grading & Integration:
• This creative component will not replace the formal paper but will boost their overall score as an enhancement.
• Graded as extra credit or an optional “enhanced distinction” project.
